hooks.command: filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..+|package-lock\.json|\.git/)'; then echo '{"decision": "deny", "reason": "Protected file — do not modify .env, lockfiles, or .git directly"}'; fi

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
echo '✅ Task complete. Run: npm run build to verify before committing.'
